title: Modern Cozy Living Room with Minimalist Decor and Warm Lighting
description: A modern cozy living room featuring a comfortable beige sofa with cushions and a throw blanket, a soft textured armchair with a blanket, a round wooden coffee table with a book, cup, and vase, and a side table with a lamp and small plant. The room is decorated with simple framed botanical prints, a floating wooden shelf with books and a plant, and a large window with beige curtains letting in natural light. The space exudes a calm, relaxing atmosphere with warm natural lighting and minimalistic, simple decor.
